title: Oracle AI Database 26ai: New Platinum & Diamond Availability Tiers
summary: At Oracle AI World Tour in New York, Oracle introduced Platinum (sub-30-second failover for Exadata + RAC) and Diamond (active-active geo-distributed clusters via GoldenGate 26ai with 0–3 second recovery) availability tiers. Post-quantum cryptography added via NIST-approved algorithms.

title: Fusion Agentic Applications for CX: AI Agents in Sales, Service & Marketing
summary: Oracle announced Fusion Agentic Applications for Customer Experience — AI agent teams embedded directly into Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications. Agents operate autonomously across sales, service, and marketing with access to unified enterprise data, workflows, and transactional context.

title: OCI Database Migration: New Assessment Feature for Automated Migrations
summary: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Database Migration service added an Assessment feature that automatically recommends optimal migration methods, checks database readiness, identifies incompatible objects, and provides automated fixups where available.

title: Oracle AI World Tour 2026: Global Event Series Launches in New York
summary: Oracle AI World Tour is a global event series running through spring 2026. The New York edition on April 9 was the flagship event, with announcements from Oracle AI Database, Fusion Cloud, and OCI teams. Microsoft co-presents at several stops as part of OCI/Azure multicloud partnership.
